_publications._publicationTitle: MicroRNA profiling of peripheral nerve sheath tumours identifies miR-29c as a tumour suppressor gene involved in tumour progression.

_contextSnippet: Transient transfection of the MPNST cell line, sNF96.2, using a miR-29c mimic, and scrambled oligonucleotides (control) revealed that cell motility was significantly reduced in transwell plates, and the scratch/wound healing assays
details: Cell motility was significantly reduced in transwell plates and scratch/wound healing assays when transfected with miR-29c mimic
